paneContent:
Root cause (in packages/storyboard/src/core/canvas/terminal-server.js): two
  compounding bugs.

   1. Racy port capture. actualServerPort = httpServer.address().port runs at Vite
  configureServer time вЂ” but the server hasn't bound yet, so address() returns null.
  The fallback (findByWorktree) is also empty because runtime-spawned vite isn't
  registered. Result: default 1234 (nothing listens).
   2. Missing base path. serverUrl = http://localhost:${port} omits the Vite base. The
  runtime now mounts every worktree under /branch--<name>/, so even with the correct
  port, all endpoints would
    404.

  Verified the real server is at
  http://localhost:1240/branch--0.5.0/_storyboard/canvas/... for this worktree. Fix in
  commit ba66226c3 (pushed):

   - Capture port via httpServer.once('listening', ...) + re-poll at session-start
   - Include base path: serverUrl = http://localhost:${port}${baseTrimmed}

  вљ пёЏ Restart the dev server for the fix to load. Existing agent sessions also need to
  be re-spawned since their config files have the wrong serverUrl already baked in.

  Summary widget posted on canvas (markdown-z8yugh).

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [вЋ‡ 0.5.0*]              @CanvasControls.jsx

вќЇ  
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  compounding bugs.

   1. Racy port capture. actualServerPort = httpServer.address().port runs at Vite
  configureServer time вЂ” but the server hasn't bound yet, so address() returns null.
  The fallback (findByWorktree) is also empty because runtime-spawned vite isn't
  registered. Result: default 1234 (nothing listens).
   2. Missing base path. serverUrl = http://localhost:${port} omits the Vite base. The
  runtime now mounts every worktree under /branch--<name>/, so even with the correct
  port, all endpoints would
    404.

  Verified the real server is at
  http://localhost:1240/branch--0.5.0/_storyboard/canvas/... for this worktree. Fix in
  commit ba66226c3 (pushed):

   - Capture port via httpServer.once('listening', ...) + re-poll at session-start
   - Include base path: serverUrl = http://localhost:${port}${baseTrimmed}

  вљ пёЏ Restart the dev server for the fix to load. Existing agent sessions also need to
  be re-spawned since their config files have the wrong serverUrl already baked in.

  Root cause (in packages/storyboard/src/core/canvas/terminal-server.js): two
  compounding bugs.

   1. Racy port capture. actualServerPort = httpServer.address().port runs at Vite
  configureServer time вЂ” but the server hasn't bound yet, so address() returns null.
  The fallback (findByWorktree) is also empty because runtime-spawned vite isn't
  registered. Result: default 1234 (nothing listens).
   2. Missing base path. serverUrl = http://localhost:${port} omits the Vite base. The
  runtime now mounts every worktree under /branch--<name>/, so even with the correct
  port, all endpoints would
    404.

  Verified the real server is at
  http://localhost:1240/branch--0.5.0/_storyboard/canvas/... for this worktree. Fix in
  commit ba66226c3 (pushed):

   - Capture port via httpServer.once('listening', ...) + re-poll at session-start
   - Include base path: serverUrl = http://localhost:${port}${baseTrimmed}

  вљ пёЏ Restart the dev server for the fix to load. Existing agent sessions also need to
